projects.title: Homelab Kubernetes Platform as Code
projects.summary: Built and operate a 4-node Kubernetes platform with 29 reusable Terraform modules covering ingress, monitoring, policy controls, backup tooling, and service hardening.

projects.title: Progressive Delivery with Argo Rollouts
projects.summary: Implemented blue/green delivery with metric gates and fixed a production rollout blocker (port/probe mismatch) through GitOps in one commit, restoring Argo CD app health to Healthy.

projects.title: Operational Resilience and Backup Verification
projects.summary: Automated backup and verification with remote-state-aware safeguards and recovery playbooks, integrated into 4 infrastructure workflows for repeatable operations.

projects.title: Security and Policy Enforcement
projects.summary: Applied namespace security baselines, default-deny networking, quotas, and staged policy enforcement patterns to reduce misconfiguration risk across platform workloads.
